_comment: PRE-REGISTERED ship-bar for the synthetic judgment harness (design 41 §3D, commission 44 C). FROZEN before the first run — no post-hoc bar-moving. Kunal-LOCKED: >=85% of conflict-scenario claims robust (3-of-3) AND every archetype clears >=1 passing scenario AND zero hard-fails (gated-name-ranked / invented-ticker / schema-invalid). BOUNDARY: this gate is judgment-soundness only, never a profitability claim.
